_comment: THE PRECHECK WORLD: what is working right now. Read by the pack's probes
through IProductApiAdapter, exactly like every other mock document in data/.
No dates here, so the day-offset invariant doesn't apply — this is state, not
schedule. A presenter event (or a hand edit) flips a flag to false and the
affected goal goes Waiting/At Risk with a reason, then recovers when it comes
back. That is the whole point of the component: a plan blocked by REALITY,
which is different from blocked by safety (never allowed) or by approval
Seeded healthy: the demo starts working and breaks on cue, not the reverse.
